findings.issue: Abstractly restates the wrongness already conveyed by the ordinary market image.
Closure tag explains the image instead of letting the normality land on its own.

findings.text: The common-house back room had been made into an infirmary in the way villages made anything into anything when they had no choice.
findings.issue: Thesis-opening summary announces the paragraph's point before the concrete sickroom details do the work.
findings.suggestedFix: Shelves gone, three bunks against one wall, four pallets on the floor.

findings.text: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses and felt only the weight of the next door ahead.
findings.couldEndEarlierAt: Jaina had expected satisfaction when the pieces met.
findings.issue: Emotional summary closes the beat by naming burden instead of stopping on the coughs.
findings.suggestedFix: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses.

findings.issue: Generic dialogue beat that could belong to any frightened prisoner and adds no specific physical read.
Another generic fear beat that labels stress without adding character-specific action.

findings.text: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs as if nothing had changed.
findings.deletionTest: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs unchanged.
findings.issue: The hedge softens a visible contradiction the sentence can state directly.
findings.suggestedFix: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs unchanged.

findings.povMismatch: This captioned abstraction steps outside Jaina's active triage into polished summary language.
It labels the scene state from above instead of giving the physical freeze Jaina could register.

findings.text: No more force in the voice, only more certainty.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence compresses Sylvanas's delivery into polished interpretive language rather than the immediate sound Jaina would catch.

findings.text: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses and felt only the weight of the next door ahead.
findings.failedQuestion: What does this cash out to?
findings.missingPayload: The concrete next task or visible threat the sentence avoids naming.
findings.reason: Placeholder weight language asks the reader to supply the burden instead of naming the next sickroom or remaining work.
findings.suggestedFix: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses.

findings.text: "In two villages, with the same kind of man attached to it," Sylvanas said.
findings.missingPayload: The actual seller pattern: pleasant grain man, lower prices, village delivery trail.
findings.reason: Dialogue reaches for incisive pattern language while dodging the specific seller identity Sylvanas is actually naming.
findings.suggestedFix: "In two villages, with the same grain seller behind it," Sylvanas said.

findings.missingPayload: The concrete conclusion already available: someone stationed a boy here and armed him with poison for capture.
findings.reason: The reply caps the deduction with sloganized abstraction instead of the operational fact already on the page.

audits.cleanReason: No dialogue exchange in this draft sets up a translation request ('plainly', 'smaller words', 'short version', street-level restatement), so the guide found no candidate simplification chains to audit.

summary.verdictReason: Fail: 12 mild pass-B kills across three guides exceeds the 3-mild threshold. The draft also carries a structural texture deficit that should be addressed during revision.

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 2.4% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'.
